response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience well beyond the 6+ requirement, with demonstrated TypeScript/Node.js work across multiple senior roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE), React experience, MongoDB/SQL exposure, AWS CDK, Docker/Kubernetes, and current AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators. Strong testing/TDD background and craftsmanship orientation align with the role. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, limited Kotlin evidence, and a polyglot focus on DLang that may not transfer directly to the primary stack.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js and React work at multiple senior roles
Active AI-agent infrastructure experience including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong testing/TDD discipline demonstrated through workshops, courses, and authored test libraries
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
Kotlin/Java exposure is dated (robotics work 2016-2018); limited recent JVM backend work
Significant career investment in DLang ecosystem which doesn't map to the target stack
